scope: Research + documentation only. No code changes. Pattern library from 10 comparable intelligence/feed/benchmark platforms.
substitution_note: Platform 10 (ampagency.com) is a digital marketing agency without a benchmark product. Substituted: Dash Social 2025 Beauty Industry Benchmarks — a directly comparable beauty-sector intelligence benchmark tool. Substitution documented in deliverable.
platforms_list: Dash Social Beauty Benchmarks (substituted for ampagency.com)
top10_patterns: Snapshot / Today View as Intelligence Hub Entry
Impact Score + Threat Badge on Every List Item
Sentiment Aggregate Banner Above Signal List
Spot → Understand → Act Arc on Every Signal
Entity Recognition Chips on Signal Cards
Filter Panel with Grouped Dimensions + More Filters Expansion
AI Brief Builder (Bulk Select → Prompt → Synthetic Signal)
